---
title: "crazy keyboard"
date: 2009-12-02
forum: Hardware
---

### Post by zey on 2009-12-02
i have installed jaunty on my computer.
now i have a problem with keyboard.
it like to press a key so many times again and again...

such as press 'i' key..
like this...



how to fix it ?
its hardware error or software errorr ?

---

### Post by alienclone on 2009-12-03
if only one key is doing it, i would say it is a hardware problem. if a lot or all keys are doing it, i would say it is a software problem.

---
